digest.en: Mali's defence minister was killed amid a wave of rebel attacks in the country. Iran's foreign minister visited Pakistan and is now heading to Russia for more talks. Netanyahu's rivals, former Israeli PMs Bennett and Lapid, have joined forces to challenge him in upcoming elections.
digest.hi: लेबनान पर इस्राइल का बड़ा हमला हुआ, जिसमें 14 लोगों की मौत हो गई और 37 घायल हो गए। इस हमले के साथ ही होर्मुज जलसंधि में आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा बन गया है। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे।

articles.title: Mali defence minister killed as country hit by wave of rebel attacks
articles.summary: Mali's defence minister was killed in a wave of rebel attacks by jihadist militants and separatists. A wave of coordinated attacks by jihadist militants and separatists has spread through the country.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U.S. envoys' trip canceled
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister returned to Pakistan after a US envoy trip was canceled. Live Updates: Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S. envoys' trip canceled CBS News. Iran's foreign minister returns to Pakistan after U. S.

articles.title: Iran’s foreign minister leaves Pakistan, heads to Russia for more talks
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi travelled to Russia for talks with senior officials. Abbas Araghchi travels to Russia, where he will speak with "senior officials", Iran's foreign ministry says. Iran’s foreign minister leaves Pakistan, heads to Russia for more talks.

articles.title: Israeli settler attacks Hebron activist’s home as soldier looks on
articles.summary: An Israeli settler attacked Palestinian activist Issa Amro's home as a soldier looked on. An Israeli settler was filmed throwing rocks and trying to break into the home of Palestinian activist Issa Amro.

articles.title: Former Israeli PMs Bennett, Lapid unite to challenge Netanyahu in elections
articles.summary: Former Israeli PMs Bennett and Lapid formed an alliance to challenge Netanyahu in elections. The two politicians' alliance is aimed at uniting a fragmented opposition against current PM Benjamin Netanyahu.

articles.title: King Charles' visit to US to proceed after Washington shooting
articles.summary: King Charles' US visit will proceed after a shooting in Washington with increased security. Security for the Royal Family say they are cooperating with United States Secret Service during the visit.

articles.title: Netanyahu's biggest rivals join forces for Israel's next election
articles.summary: Naftali Bennett's party merged with "There is a Future" to challenge Netanyahu's government. "Together," a merger between former right-wing Prime Minister Naftali Bennett's party and centrist "There is a Future," poses threat to Netanyahu's government in the upcoming Israeli election.

articles.title: Trump and officials 'likely' targets of press dinner shooting suspect, authorities believe
articles.summary: Authorities believe the press dinner shooting suspect targeted Trump and officials. The suspect is expected to be charged with assault of a federal officer and using a firearm during a crime of violence, officials have said.

articles.title: Trump Event Shooter Mocked Hotel Security In Manifesto, Said 'Won't Use Slugs'
articles.summary: Trump stated the shooter acted alone as a "lone wolf". The suspect had mocked hotel security in a manifesto. Trump said officials believed he acted alone and was what he called a "lone wolf".

articles.title: Trump makes a fresh case for White House ballroom after shooting incident at dinner event
articles.summary: Trump contends a petitioner has no standing in a case about a White House event. Mr. Trump slammed the petitioner in the case, contending that she had absolutely no standing to bring such a suit and it must be dropped immediately.

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
articles.summary: Israel's President Isaac Herzog will not pardon Benjamin Netanyahu. Instead, he will seek a plea deal in Netanyahu's corruption case. President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

articles.title: As Kash Patel's Past Catches Up, Report Hints At Trump Axe
articles.summary: Questions have been raised about Kash Patel's use of FBI resources. Separate questions have also been raised about Patel's use of FBI resources. As Kash Patel's Past Catches Up, Report Hints At Trump Axe.

articles.title: First trial of Assad-era Syrian official starts in Damascus
articles.summary: Syria's first public trial of a former Assad-era official, Atef Najib, has started in Damascus. Syria begun its first public trial of former Assad-era officials, with ex-security chief Atef Najib appearing in court.

articles.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint
articles.summary: India hosted a BRICS deputy foreign ministers' meeting, but a joint statement couldn't be agreed upon due to differences between UAE and Iran, and India on Israel-Palestine language. A 'Chair's Statement' was issued instead.

articles.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi continued diplomatic efforts over the weekend, but US President Donald Trump scrapped a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, casting doubt on US-Iran peace hopes. The stalemate risks escalating tensions without a deal.

articles.title: Amid Iran's Attacks, UAE Called For Help. Israel Responded With Iron Dome
articles.summary: Israel deployed the Iron Dome to help the UAE counter Iran's attacks, which included 550 ballistic and cruise missiles and over 2,200 drones. The UAE had requested assistance. Iran struck the UAE with 550 ballistic and cruise missiles, and over 2,200 drones.

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call US if it wants to negotiate
articles.summary: Trump said Iran can call the US if it wants to negotiate. Trump says Iran can call US if it wants to negotiate.

articles.title: What to Know About King Charles and Queen Camilla’s U.S. State Visit Hosted by Trump
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla of Britain are set to visit the US for a state visit hosted by President Trump, with events including a garden party, a congressional address, and a banquet. The visit starts on Monday.

articles.title: Notes from Central Taiwan: As Trump-Xi nears, once again, the sell out
articles.summary: Taiwan's government has quietly dropped plans to upgrade its military's air defense system, citing budget constraints, ahead of the US-China summit. The decision has sparked concerns among defense officials, who fear it will compromise national security.

articles.title: Ceasefire cracking, Israel looks to spread area of control in Lebanon, orders more evacuations
articles.summary: Israel has ordered more evacuations in Lebanon as it seeks to expand its control in the region. The move follows reports of a ceasefire cracking, with violence escalating in the area.

articles.title: सीजफायर के बीच लेबनान पर इस्राइल का बड़ा हमला, 14 लोगों की मौत; 37 घायल
articles.summary: इस्राइल ने लेबनान पर बड़ा हमला किया, जिसमें 14 लोग मारे गए और 37 घायल हुए. यह हमला सीजफायर के बीच हुआ था. हमले की जानकारी अभी तक विस्तृत नहीं है.

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा
articles.summary: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में आर्थिक युद्ध की स्थिति बन गई है। यह क्षेत्र महत्वपूर्ण है क्योंकि यहां से बहुत सारा तेल और गैस का व्यापार होता है। विचार: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा Jagran।

articles.title: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे, ट्रंप ने कहा- युद्ध जल्द ख़त्म होगा
articles.summary: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे। इससे पहले वह अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले ओमान चले गए थे। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान वापस लौटे हैं, जबकि अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले वो ओमान चले गए थे.

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर कर सकते हैं बात; फिर नाटो पर भड़के अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर बात कर सकते हैं। इसके बाद उन्होंने नाटो पर टिप्पणी की और कहा कि यह संगठन पुराना हो गया है। ट्रंप की टिप्पणियों से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम होने की संभावना है।

articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस में ट्रंप के डिनर कार्यक्रम में फ़ायरिंग के बाद एक संदिग्ध को हिरासत में लिया गया है. उसके पास शॉटगन, हैंडगन और चाकू मिला था. पुलिस ने संदिग्ध को हिरासत में लिया.

articles.title: चेर्नोबिल हादसे की 40वीं वर्षगांठ पर परमाणु खतरे की चेतावनी, ताजा हमलों में 16 लोगों की मौत

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।
